data.title: Greenberg Traurig, LLP hires Stacey Bosshardt as shareholder in Environmental practice in D.C., a former DOJ assistant chief.
data.description: A well-known international law firm, Greenberg Traurig, LLP, recently welcomed Stacey Bosshardt to its team. Bosshardt, previously an assistant section chief in the U.S. Department of Justice's Environment and Natural Resources Division, joins as a shareholder in the Environmental practice at the firm's Washington, D.C. office. This addition is significant for the firm's growth in this sector. The move took place on September 25th, reflecting the company's commitment to bringing on board top talent.

data.title: Introduction of M12 connectors with various coding types for different applications, ensuring no mismating, optimized for signal, power, and data.
data.description: In SHENZHEN, China, on September 25, 2025, it was reported that M12 connectors are categorized into various coding types such as A, B, C, D, L, K, S, P, T, X, Y, and Coded. Each coding type features a distinct keying system aimed at avoiding improper connections and is designed specifically for signal, power, or data applications.

data.title: InfraBlocks launches digital platform for bamboo carbon credits at NYC Climate Week in partnership with Asian Development Bank, Kumi Analytics, BanQu, Rizome.
data.description: During NYC Climate Week, InfraBlocks Technologies revealed the debut of a new digital platform designed to oversee carbon credits generated from engineered bamboo projects. This platform is a result of collaboration with the Asian Development Bank, Kumi Analytics, BanQu, and Rizome. The initiative integrates satellite imagery and other technologies to track these carbon credits effectively.

data.title: FILMKID to produce 2nd feature "Crime District" by Cole Mueller, shooting in 2026. Los Angeles, Sept. 2025.
data.description: Cole Mueller, a writer/director, established FILMKID, a production company. They revealed plans for their second feature film, a crime-thriller called "Crime District," which is scheduled to be filmed in 2026. The announcement was made in Los Angeles on September 25, 2025.

data.title: Voyomotive and Matrack collaborate for vehicle maintenance alerts at 36,000+ locations in North America.
data.description: A strategic integration has been established to provide automated vehicle diagnostics and maintenance alerts to over 36,000 service locations throughout North America. This collaboration was publicized by Voyomotive, LLC, the creator of the VOYOLink Intelligent Service Platform, on September 25, 2025 in Sarasota, Florida.

data.title: EK Health Services appoints Kyle Devereaux as VP of Sales. Leading workers' comp managed care company in San Jose.
data.description: In a recent move, EK Health Services Inc., a prominent player in workers' compensation managed care, has named Kyle Devereaux as their Vice President of Sales. The announcement was made in San Jose, California on September 25, 2025. This appointment comes as EK Health Services Inc. continues to strengthen its position in the industry, showcasing their commitment to growth and excellence.

data.title: Global brokerage The Agency opens new office in Rockwall, Texas, becoming its fifth office in Texas. LA, Sept. 25, 2025.
data.description: A global real estate brokerage firm, The Agency, has recently opened its fifth office in Texas, specifically in Rockwall. This new location marks a significant expansion as the company continues to grow its presence in the state. The Agency Rockwall will be spearheaded by experienced professionals in the industry, further solidifying the firm's commitment to providing top-notch services in the region. This development showcases the company's dedication to expanding its reach, with the new office adding to the existing network of locations.

data.title: Book warns of AI dangers, says 'Everyone Dies,' but most AI chatbots unfazed by the prophecy.
data.description: Despite being described as a "suicide race" by two well-known AI pessimists in their book, most AI platforms seem unconcerned about the potential risks involved in the current AI arms race.

data.title: BlackRock launches new Bitcoin yield ETF to complement $87B spot Bitcoin ETF IBIT. Company filed registered trust for proposed product.
data.description: BlackRock has submitted paperwork to establish a registered trust company in support of its planned Bitcoin Premium Income ETF. This new product aims to generate yield and will complement BlackRock's existing $87 billion spot Bitcoin ETF, IBIT.

data.title: Pre-order ROG Xbox Ally and Ally X now for next-gen performance starting at 5:00 p.m. (PST) on September 25, 2025.
data.description: In collaboration with Xbox, these cutting-edge gaming portable devices boast remarkable advancements in performance across generations. Noteworthy features include the AMD Ryzen™ AI Z2 Extreme and Z2 A processors. Pre-orders for these devices will commence on September 25, 2025, at 5:00 p.m. (PST).

Asian stocks looked set to decline as strong U.S. GDP growth and mixed signals from the Federal Reserve on rate cuts raised concerns over high valuations, while U.S. futures wobbled following President Trump’s announcement of new tariffs on trucks and branded pharmaceuticals.

data.title: New ROG Xbox Ally & Ally X available for pre-order in Canada from C$799. Handhelds offer powerful gen-on-gen performance.
data.description: The ROG Xbox Ally & Ally X can now be pre-ordered in Canada starting from C$799. These devices, integrated with Xbox technology, offer impressive performance across generations and feature a fresh interface for enhanced user experience.

data.title: Global gelatin market projected to reach $5.6 billion by 2029 with 6.9% CAGR growth. North America leads, driven by pharmaceutical applications and diverse sources. US has 39,646 food and beverage processing facilities.
data.description: The global gelatin market is seeing significant growth, with a market size of USD 4.0 billion in 2024 and projected to reach USD 5.6 billion by 2029, growing at a CAGR of 6.9%. Gelatin is derived from animal (bovine and porcine skins/bones) and plant sources, with the bovine segment dominating due to its wide application in various industries. A notable investment in August 2022 by JBS S.A in a collagen and gelatin facility is helping meet the rising demand for health-focused gelatin products. The pharmaceutical sector is the fastest-growing segment, utilizing gelatin in various drug delivery systems. North America, particularly the US, Canada, and Mexico, is a major market player due to factors like increasing health awareness, aging populations, and a thriving food industry. The US has around 39,646 food processing facilities, signaling the demand for gelatin in fortification.

JPMorgan Asset Management and Mirae Asset Global Investments have launched new ETFs in Taiwan and South Korea, tapping booming retail demand in Asia for U.S. technology stocks. The launches add to a record pace of U.S. tech-focused ETF debuts, with 63 such funds now available in

data.title: Data breach at Outcomes One, Inc. affects 149,904 health plan records, investigated for privacy violation.
data.description: An ongoing investigation by Schubert Jonckheer & Kolbe LLP based in San Francisco is examining a recent data breach that resulted in the unauthorized acquisition of confidential data belonging to 149,904 individuals who are members of health plans associated with Outcomes One, Inc. - a company located in Florida.

data.title: BlackRock seeks higher Bitcoin profits with a new $87 billion ETF 'sequel,' the Bitcoin Premium Income ETF.
data.description: BlackRock has submitted paperwork for a registered trust company to support its upcoming Bitcoin Premium Income ETF. This new product aims to generate yield and will act as a companion to their existing $87 billion spot Bitcoin ETF, IBIT.

data.title: PNC Financial Services facing investigation for data breach of 740,000 customer records. Schubert Jonckheer & Kolbe LLP leading probe.
data.description: An investigation by Schubert Jonckheer & Kolbe LLP in San Francisco has been launched into a data breach affecting 740,000 customers of PNC Financial Services. This Pennsylvania-based bank, with 2,200 branches across the country, experienced unauthorized access to sensitive customer information.

data.title: Privacy investigation launched for Motility Software Solutions over data breach exposing 760,000 customer records.
data.description: A law firm in San Francisco, Schubert Jonckheer & Kolbe LLP, is currently looking into a data breach that resulted in the unauthorized entry to the private data of 760,000 clients of Motility Software Solutions. This Florida-based company offers dealer management software.

Donald Trump signed an executive order to advance a deal that would spin off TikTok’s U.S. operations into a new, American-owned venture valued at about $14 billion. The plan reduces ByteDance’s stake to under 20% and places Oracle in charge of securing U.S. user data and
